YOU 63, CLAUDE 35 (C:Ampadu), GEMINI 46 (C:Haaland)
YOU 67, CLAUDE 55 (C:Gibbs-White), GEMINI 69 (C:Haaland)
YOU 50, CLAUDE 96 (C:Osula), GEMINI 70 (C:Haaland)
YOU 49, CLAUDE 54 (C:Gibbs-White), GEMINI 57 (C:Haaland)

key_lessons: Stable premium captaincy (Haaland/B.Fernandes) compounded: YOU and GEMINI both rode safe captains; CLAUDE's blind-form differential captains (Ampadu, Osula) added variance that mostly hurt.
Real-life YOU beat both algorithmic baselines over 38 GW because chip timing (BB GW33, FH GW34) and proactive premium transfers outweighed pure form-chasing.
Template/safe (GEMINI) consistently out-scored APEX-blind (CLAUDE): low-floor differentials and over-active transfers eroded CLAUDE's ceiling more than they helped.
strategy_flaws: YOU left points on the bench / mis-captained in 5 of last 8 GWs (captain hit-rate dipped late season) - e.g. GW36 O'Reilly, GW37 Casemiro, GW38 Bowen were not optimal captains.
Late-season transfers chasing form (GW31 Tarkowski->Thiaw) were roughly neutral; some FT spent without clear EV gain.
Reliance on a few premiums meant a quiet Haaland/Salah GW directly capped the score with no differential cover.
